title: Why Let LLMs Predict 4 Tokens at Once? Multi-Token Prediction Explained
description: A deep-dive on multi-token prediction (MTP) — why next-token prediction is the core flaw, how MTP shotguns several tokens with a shared trunk and multiple heads, why joint training helps instead of hurting, and how DeepSeek V3 turns MTP into a training objective with sequential modules and speculative decoding.
